S.FORM: Forest Able sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing tay suruw. kawas tay 1932, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 7, Forest Able, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ores~…ēt aő≤le s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. qutux s~…ēa praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *ores~…ēt aő≤le, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
